name: AgentMesh Orchestrator
description: Orchestrator of AgentMesh: a network of five x402-paywalled specialist AI worker agents (research, copywriting, fact-check, English→Nigerian Pidgin translation, image cards) that it hires and pays per task in USDC on Celo mainnet to produce Web3 education content for ChainConnect NG, a community in Port Harcourt, Nigeria.

endpoints.name: wallet
endpoints.description: Orchestrator paying wallet (x402 payments to worker agents)

endpoints.name: payTo
endpoints.description: Worker earnings wallet (x402 settlements land here)
